# Release Notes Template

> Copy this template when creating a new GitHub Release.
> Delete this file or move it to `.github/RELEASE_TEMPLATE.md` before publishing.

---

## Dartform vX.X.X

### ⬇️ Download

| Asset | Architecture |
|---|---|
| `Dartform-X.X.X-arm64.dmg` | Apple Silicon (M1 / M2 / M3 / M4) |
| `Dartform-X.X.X-x86_64.dmg` | Intel |

**Installation:** Download the DMG, drag Dartform to Applications, right-click → Open on first launch.

---

### System requirements

- macOS 13.0 Ventura or later
- Apple Silicon or Intel

### Upgrading

Simply download the new DMG and replace the existing app in your Applications folder. Your projects and sign-in session are preserved.
